messages: {"parts":[{"content":"Now I'll capture this as a template by analyzing its design DNA:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"create_or_rewrite_file","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/frontend/templates/warm-consulting.yaml\", \"content\": \"# Warm Consulting Landing Page Template\\n# Professional yet approachable style for B2B services\\n\\n---\\n# TEMPLATE METADATA\\n\\nname: warm-consulting\\ndescription: |\\n  Professional consulting/agency template with warm stone tones and amber accents.\\n  Creates trust through restraint while remaining approachable. Ideal for \\n  B2B services, consulting firms, agencies, and professional practices\\n  that want to feel established without being cold or corporate.\\n\\nsource: |\\n  Captured from GTM consulting landing page generated for Launchpoint.\\n  Combines the credibility of minimal-saas with warmer, more human tones\\n  that work well for service businesses where relationships matter.\\n\\ncreated: 2026-02-06\\n\\n---\\n# COLOR PALETTE\\n\\npalette:\\n  primary: \\\"#1c1917\\\"      # Stone-900 - primary text, key buttons\\n  secondary: \\\"#57534e\\\"    # Stone-600 - secondary text, descriptions\\n  accent: \\\"#d97706\\\"       # Amber-600 - icons, highlights, stage markers\\n  background: \\\"#fafaf9\\\"   # Stone-50 - main page background\\n  surface: \\\"#ffffff\\\"      # White - cards, elevated sections\\n  text: \\\"#1c1917\\\"         # Stone-900 - body text\\n  text_muted: \\\"#a8a29e\\\"   # Stone-400 - subtle text, metadata\\n\\n---\\n# TYPOGRAPHY\\n\\ntypography:\\n  heading_font: \\\"system-ui\\\"\\n  body_font: \\\"system-ui\\\"\\n  scale: normal\\n  heading_weight: 600\\n\\n---\\n# LAYOUT SETTINGS\\n\\nlayout:\\n  max_width: standard     # max-w-5xl (1024px)\\n  spacing: balanced       # Generous but not excessive\\n  border_radius: subtle   # rounded-md (6px) for buttons, rounded-lg (8px) for cards\\n\\n---\\n# PAGE SECTIONS\\n\\nsections:\\n  - type: nav\\n    variant: fixed-minimal   # Fixed position, clean, CTA button\\n  \\n  - type: hero\\n    variant: left-aligned    # Left-aligned text with badge, asymmetric\\n  \\n  - type: social-proof\\n    variant: stats-bar       # Horizontal bar with key metrics\\n  \\n  - type: features\\n    variant: grid-2x2        # 2-column grid with cards\\n  \\n  - type: process\\n    variant: timeline-3step  # Horizontal timeline with week markers\\n  \\n  - type: cta\\n    variant: centered        # Simple centered CTA\\n  \\n  - type: footer\\n    variant: minimal         # Just copyright and location\\n\\n---\\n# STYLE NOTES\\n\\nstyle_notes: |\\n  Warm, professional aesthetic that balances credibility with approachability.\\n  Key characteristics:\\n  \\n  **Color philosophy:**\\n  - Stone palette creates warmth without feeling dated\\n  - Amber accent adds energy and draws attention to key elements\\n  - White surfaces for cards create visual hierarchy against stone background\\n  - Avoid pure black (#000) - use stone-900 instead\\n  \\n  **Typography treatment:**\\n  - Tight tracking on headlines (-0.025em via tracking-tight)\\n  - Relaxed line-height on body text (leading-relaxed)\\n  - Headlines are semibold (600), never bold\\n  - Secondary text uses stone-600, never pure gray\\n  \\n  **Card and container patterns:**\\n  - Cards have subtle borders (border-stone-200)\\n  - Hover states darken borders slightly (hover:border-stone-300)\\n  - No drop shadows on cards - borders create definition\\n  - Padding is generous (p-8 on service cards)\\n  \\n  **Icon treatment:**\\n  - Icons use amber-600 color for warmth\\n  - Size w-8 h-8 for feature cards\\n  - Lucide icons with default stroke width\\n  \\n  **Button styles:**\\n  - Primary: bg-stone-900, white text, rounded-md\\n  - Hover: bg-stone-800 (slightly lighter)\\n  - Include ArrowRight icon for primary CTAs\\n  - Secondary/link: text only with hover state\\n  \\n  **Badge pattern (hero):**\\n  - Pill-shaped with bg-amber-100\\n  - Small dot indicator (w-2 h-2 rounded-full)\\n  - Text in amber-800\\n  \\n  **Spacing philosophy:**\\n  - Generous vertical padding on sections (py-24)\\n  - Consistent horizontal padding (px-6)\\n  - Gap-6 between cards in grids\\n  - Gap-4 between buttons in button groups\\n  \\n  **Process/timeline section:**\\n  - Week markers in amber-600, small and semibold\\n  - Three-column grid on desktop\\n  - Each step: marker → title → description\\n  \\n  **Overall emotional tone:**\\n  Professional but not cold. The warm colors and generous spacing suggest\\n  a firm that takes its time and cares about quality. The restraint in\\n  design implies confidence - they don't need flashy visuals to prove\\n  their worth. Suitable for consulting, agencies, professional services\\n  where trust and expertise matter more than excitement.\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01B8S9G3j3LgA74Rse4gpH8r","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":74282,"cache_write_tokens":2773,"cache_read_tokens":71508,"output_tokens":1303,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":2773,"cache_read_input_tokens":71508,"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1303}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T21:23:43.161029Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01Ueuna4scHB3hhGx49nSsED","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"e7fb7b3c-3b91-4e98-8306-057bea19beed","metadata":null}
